full_text: March 17, 2026 View in a web browser Share Good morning! Welcome to Metro's daily football newsletter. Read on for the day's biggest and best stories, latest news, gossip and more about the team you love. As a loyal Metro reader, we want to make sure you never miss our must-read stories. Click the button below to see news from us first in Google Search.
